summary: Iter10 sprint (6 features): 6/6 backend tests PASSED (portal gating admin, compliance-report/archive-ged/runs, member-registry SIRET extract PDF, invalid SIRET 404, health). 11/11 frontend acceptance criteria PASSED end-to-end: /tarifs dark violet/gold cards + RECOMMENDED badge + Sign up buttons + NO cta-contact + 'Join the Hub' present; /superadmin Emails tab shows BOTH data-testids email-archive-history AND compliance-archive-history with 2026-07 Archivé; /superadmin Registres shows registry-extract-<org_id> button on the row with SIRET; notifications-bell renders 5 items with 1 unread mark-read button + 'Voir toutes les notifications' navigates to /notifications; landing page 'Access conditions' section has 3 positive check items. UI is currently rendered in English (i18n) but strings map 1:1 to French spec.

integration_issues.issue: Bell shows 5 notifications for Super Admin but /notifications page shows 0 (Aucune notification trouvée / 0 Total). Possible mismatch between GET /api/notifications used by bell vs endpoint used by /notifications page or user-scoping. Not in sprint scope but flagged.

action_items: Investigate /notifications page showing 0 items while notifications-bell dropdown shows 5 items for the same Super Admin session (data-source mismatch between /api/notifications used by bell vs standalone page endpoint).
critical_code_review_comments: Notification click behavior verified: clicking the notification body (not mark-read) navigates to the target route (adhésion → /admin-v2). Tested from /admin-v2 so URL unchanged but target matches. Recommend adding a test from a different page to explicitly verify navigation change.
/tarifs redesign well executed: dark violet cards, gold-accented headings, RECOMMENDED badge on middle card, three Sign up CTAs + Join the Hub at FAQ end, and NO 'Parler à un conseiller' cta-contact.

Company extract flow (SIRET → PDF → GEDESS) works end-to-end for EDF SIRET 55208131766522: api gouv 200, PDF generated (%PDF header), pushed to GEDESS (log confirms upload OK 47fa9e4e-...), Content-Type application/pdf.
Portal gating on POST /api/auth/login enforced: admin login without portal:admin returns 403 with 'Administration' block message; with portal:admin returns 200 + JWT.
test_credentials: admin@kdmarche-oscop.fr / AdminKDM2025! (with portal:'admin' or via /admin/connexion UI)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 2026-07 SUCCESS runs and existing buyer registry row (TEST BUYER PRO cff9af73 with SIRET in GUADELOUPE).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter10 sprint fully verified. Note UI locale currently English — strings map 1:1 to FR spec. Minor open item: /notifications standalone page shows 0 while bell shows 5 — investigate data-source consistency. Landing regression 'Conditions d'accès' (rendered EN 'Access conditions') displays 3 positive check items.
rca of the issue: N/A — all sprint acceptance criteria PASS.
